diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Executor Accord Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [Active Instances Directory](a1260e19-86fc-4ebe-a53a-501e4baf9752), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [Hub Data Repository](10c951e0-3200-4359-a76e-c1ff9ccb9105).
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes
